title: Dortmanna eckloniana
taxonomy: Dortmanna eckloniana is classified within the family Haloragaceae and is a species of flowering plant. It belongs to the genus Dortmanna, which is a monotypic genus. This genus is further classified within the order Haloragales. The family Haloragaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as water-dilly or dilly. Dortmanna eckloniana is native to Australia and is an aquatic plant.
uses: Dortmanna eckloniana is a plant species known for its potential medicinal uses. The plant has been studied for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits.
